title: EQ - Custom EQ, change the value on the slider, Reset EQ
scenario: Custom EQ slider positions do not reset to default center after using Reset EQ button in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
5. Adjust one or more EQ slider values (e.g., move sliders up or down from the default center position).
7. Observe the position of the EQ slider circles.
expected: After tapping Reset EQ, all EQ slider circles return to the default center (middle) position.
